title: Hannibal
director: Carlo Ludovico Bragaglia, Edgar G. Ulmer
writer: Ottavio Poggi, Mortimer Braus, Sandro Continenza
actors: Victor Mature, Gabriele Ferzetti, Rita Gam
plot: During the Second Punic War in 218 BC, Carthaginian general Hannibal attacks the Roman Republic by crossing the Pyrenees and the Alps with his vast army.
